ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county's centroid */,
  "county_type" TEXT /* Type of county (e.g., rural, urban) */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "statehood_year" INTEGER /* Year the state joined the Union */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the state */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the state */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate type */,
  "rate_name" TEXT /* Name of the rate type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rate type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the rate */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate category */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate subcategory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the rate is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rates_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES rate_subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rates_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES rate_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_rates" (
  "county_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county rate entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the rate was recorded */,
  "rate_value" REAL /* Value of the rate */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the rate value (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the rate value is an estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_rates_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_rates_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_rates_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES rate_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "is_reliable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the source is considered reliable */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the source is the primary source for the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the rate category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rate category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES rate_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the rate subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rate subcategory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the subcategory is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date the user last performed an activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "can_view_data" INTEGER /* Permission to view data */,
  "can_edit_data" INTEGER /* Permission to edit data */,
  "can_delete_data" INTEGER /* Permission to delete data */,
  "can_view_reports" INTEGER /* Permission to view reports */,
  "can_create_reports" INTEGER /* Permission to create reports */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "county_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county rate being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client accessing the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_rate_id") REFERENCES county_rates ("county_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate file */,
  "county_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county rate the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the rate file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the rate file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the file was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the file is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_files_county_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_rate_id") REFERENCES county_rates ("county_rate_id")
)
